AnonyArmour

v1.2
SYSTEM SECURE
Defended 0
Exfiltrated 0
GPU & WebGL Shield
Spoofs GPU, card vendor, and renderer
Navigator Mask
Masks CPU, RAM, platform and client hints
Screen & Viewport
Spoofs monitor and window client dimensions
Canvas Farbling
Adds tiny noise to pixel readout API calls
Audio Guard
Scrambles audio buffer waveforms
WebDriver Cleaner
Deletes browser automation hooks
Biometrics Protector
Guards and restricts camera access
WebRTC Shield
Blocks WebRTC IP leaks & STUN queries
Anonymity is a right, not a privilege.
